stemHtml: With regard to a twin spool gas turbine engine, an abortive start (hung start) will result in:

options.a: N2 speed stabilising at a lower than normal rpm and a subsequent increase in EGT.
options.b: N2 speed stabilising at a higher than normal rpm and a subsequent increase in EGT.
options.c: N2 speed stabilising at a higher than normal rpm and a subsequent decrease in EGT.
options.d: N2 speed stabilising at a lower than normal rpm and a subsequent decrease in EGT.
